title: Hubris Hypothesis of Takeovers: In the context of mergers, what is the Hubris Hypothesis?...
summary: Explain the Hubris Hypothesis where managerial overconfidence leads to overpayment in acquisitions.
prompt: In the context of mergers, what is the Hubris Hypothesis?

options.text: The Hubris Hypothesis suggests that managers may overestimate their own

solution: The Hubris Hypothesis suggests that managers may overestimate their own valuation capabilities, leading to overpayment in acquisitions. This behavior often results in negative market reactions post-announcement.
